changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO users (id, full_name, email, password_hash, role, position, unit_id, manager_id, is_active, password_updated_at, password_history, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, created_at, -- Now backfill org_units.head_user_id (FKs are valid only after users exist) UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 2 WHERE id = 1; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 3 WHERE id = 2; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 4 WHERE id = 3; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 5 WHERE id = 4; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 6 WHERE id = 5; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 7 WHERE id = 6; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 8 WHERE id = 7; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 10 WHERE id = 8; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 11 WHERE id = 9; UPDATE org_units SET head_user_id = 9 WHERE id = 10;
